completion_summary: Replied to Marcus Johnson's project inquiry on FreelanceHub.

actions.reasoning: Click the 'View inbox →' link to open the messages inbox where new project inquiries can be read and responded to.
Open the message from Marcus Johnson, which appears to be a new project inquiry, so we can read it and respond.

actions.text:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you for reaching out about the React Dashboard project. I’m very interested and would love to learn more about the scope, timeline, and budget you have in mind.

My standard rate is $80/hr, and I’m available to start next week. Please let me know any additional details or requirements so we can discuss how I can best help.

Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards,
Jordan Mitchell
actions.reasoning: Typed a professional response in the reply textarea and clicked the Send button to notify the client.
Send the composed reply to Marcus Johnson.
